---
title: "Example Talk"
date: "2024-01-15"
description: "An example RevealJS presentation."
categories: [example]
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    footer: "project_name"
---

## Motivation

What problem are we solving and why does it matter?

## Methods

Describe the approach.

## Results

Key findings go here.

```{{r}}
#| echo: false
# plot(results)
```

## Conclusions

- Main takeaway one
- Main takeaway two

## Thank You

Questions?
